case_title: MARIA ELENA GUERRA COTO VS. EDITH A GARCIA AMAYA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-27-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND SERGIO DELEON APPEARS ON HER BEHALF AND DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CASE CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRA COTO, MARIA ELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA AMAYA, EDITH A DBA (TRANSPORTES DAVID) $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA AMAYA, EDITH A DBA (TRANSPORTES DAVID)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-24-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MYNOR ANDRADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
